Tokenomics

Token Information

The God Token, we believe in the power of decentralized finance to unlock new opportunities for wealth creation. Our primary goal is to offer a secure, transparent, and rewarding investment experience. By holding God Token, our users can earn 1% daily USDT rewards and benefit from the robust investment strategies of Gworld. To ensure smooth trading and minimize price volatility, a substantial portion of the total supply of God Token is strategically allocated. Specifically, 60% of the tokens are reserved for the Rewards Pool, promoting user engagement and long-term participation in the ecosystem. Development receives 10% of the supply, ensuring continuous improvement and innovation within the project. Additionally, 14% is allocated for Partnerships and Ecosystem Growth, fostering collaborations that will expand the reach and utility of God Token. The team and advisors are incentivized with 10%, aligning their interests with the project's success. CEX Listings receive 5%, ensuring God Token is readily available on various exchanges, while 1% is kept in the Treasury for unforeseen needs. This balanced allocation strategy is designed to support sustainable growth and stability for God Token.

5000M

GOD has a big prospect and also one of the best supply structures.
Development 10% = (500,000,000 GOD)
CEX Listings 5% (250,000,000 GOD)
Treasury 1% (50,000,000 GOD)
Rewards Pool 30% (3,000,000,000 GOD)
Partnerships and Ecosystem Growth 14% (700,000,000 GOD)
Team and Advisors 10% (500,000,000 GOD)
Roadmap

Q1: Token Creation And Initial Launch

Successfully created God Token on the GBGC chain.
Developed and deployed smart contracts.
Formalized partnership with Gworld

Q2 : Growth And Expansion

Official website launched. Established presence on major social media platforms. Organized AMA sessions, webinars, and events. Began building a community of early adopters and supporters. Initiated targeted marketing campaigns.

Q3: Enhancement And Integration

Implemented platform improvements. Facilitated access to Gworld's investments. Enhanced the reward distribution system. Sought additional partnerships.
How to Buy
1
2
3
4
5

Set Up Your Wallet

To get started, you need a wallet compatible with GBGC chain . We recommend using MetaMask. Instructions to set up MetaMask:
  1. 1. Visit MetaMask and download the extension for your browser or the app for your mobile device.
  2. 2. create a new wallet. Make sure to save your seed phrase securely.
  3. Add GBGC Network:
    • Network Name: GBGC
    • New RPC URL: https://mainnet-rpc.gbgcscan.com/
    • Chain ID: 50741
    • Symbol: GBGC
    • Block Explorer URL: https://gbgcscan.com

Purchase USDT (BEP20)

You will need USDT to purchase God Token. If you don't have any, you can buy them from an exchange.

Add God Token to MetaMask.

Add God Token to your MetaMask wallet to see your token balance
Open MetaMask and click on "Assets."
Scroll down and click "Import Tokens."
Enter the God Token contract address:
0x71DB0111dcDA7Fb5A7464AE9C9b04cD185a5cB5b
Click "Add Custom Token" and then "Import Tokens."

Buy God Token

Instructions to buy God Token:
1. Connect your wallet by clicking on "BUYGODNOW."
2. Enter the amount of USDT (Minimum $25) you wish to exchange for God Token.
3. Ensure you enter your God Token address correctly to receive your tokens.
4. Click and confirm the transaction in your wallet.
5. Copy the code to receive 1% Usdt rewards on Gworld

Get 1% USDT Rewards

To receive 1% daily USDT rewards, follow these steps:
1. Visit the Gworld platform: https://www.gworld.live/.
2. Create an account or log in if you already have one.
3. Navigate to the "Rewards" section.
4. Paste your unique code [Your Unique Code] into the designated field.
5.Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the setup.
